entry.title: The Mage's Home
entry.summary:
Author: DaoOfGay

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,523Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 15

Summary: After a severe crash out and mental breakdown that resulted in him opening his soul and awakening it to his true power, Stiles is kicked out of Scott's pack by said Alpha. Years later, a much more mature and powerful Stiles receives an S.O.S message from a friend, and this time, he won't fail. Or; Stiles leaves Beacon Hills, makes his own pack, gets better, and returns to kick ass.

entry.title: Some Of Us Are Human
entry.summary:
Author: Kass_Writes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,830Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 769

Summary: In which Stiles is kicked out of Scott’s pack and the Sheriff is tired of Scott McCall hurting his son. He calls in reinforcements and those reinforcements come to clean up the mess of Beacon Hills while also kicking some serious True Alpha ass. Scott McCall will learn one thing by the time it’s all over………………….. No one is allowed to hurt Stiles EVER.

entry.title: Balls-Deep & Busted
entry.summary:
Author: Nightowl_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,469Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: In the middle of a heated, shamelessly explicit afternoon romp, Derek rides Stiles with reckless abandon—moaning loud enough to wake the neighbors—until Scott bursts through the door without knocking. Chaos ensues as Stiles scrambles to shield his boyfriend, Scott spins away in horror, and Derek refuses to let the interruption kill the mood, clenching and grinding shamelessly while Scott rants in the background. Or the one where Scott walks in on his best friend balls-deep in Derek Hale and gets the trauma of a lifetime, only for the couple to pick right back up the second the door slams shut—because apparently nothing kills the mood like a best friend's horrified screech when his timing is tragically impeccable.

entry.title: Hiraeth
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,689Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 33

Summary: The Nemeton got lost so Derek and Stiles went to Brazil to look for the mythical being Saci-Pererê that could help them out to locate it. Unknown to them, the journey will not only lead to solve the mystery of the Nemeton's disapperance, but it will also be the key to self-discovery and hopefully love and happy endings. Unfortunately, nothing good ever comes without a price.

entry.title: A Roomie In Need
entry.summary:
Author: Nightowl_22

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,745Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: Stiles comes home expecting an empty apartment, only to find his brooding roommate Derek Hale drowning his sorrows in beer after being stood up on a date. The guy was a controlling liar anyway, but Derek's real frustration? He was genuinely looking forward to finally getting laid after too long without it—he doesn't do hookups with strangers and needs some connection first. When Stiles casually suggests Derek doesn't have to look far for willing company (and reveals he's bisexual), Derek takes the hint fast. Or the one where Stiles makes an offer he never expected Derek to take—turning a disappointing night into the hottest, most honest hookup of their lives, and two idiots finally admitting how badly they've wanted each other all along.

entry.title: the gift
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,693Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: “Yeah, just like that, angel. There you go,” Stiles tells him softly, stroking over his bare stomach as he reaches down to free Derek's cock from his panties. “So hard for me, Derek. You feel so good, don’t you, baby?”Derek nods again, a small whine curling from the back of his throat. It does feel good. It feels fucking euphoric to be handled by Stiles. Derek is being so good for him, giving Daddy everything he asks for, sitting fat and pretty in his collar and silk panties, full to the brim of shit and food that will inevitably become shit—the gift that keeps on giving.He’s been well tended to, played with, and loved. It’s all he could ever ask for. Of course he feels good.

entry.title: the spaces in between
entry.summary:
Author: Melpomene (Aconitehart)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,503Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 21

Summary: The story goes like this. Long ago, a witch desired a local hedge knight and struck up a romance with him. She desired him far more than he desired her, and when his interest waned, the witch cursed him to sleep eternal. Trapped between life and death, the knight lingers, unable to wake up or communicate. But the witch's cruelty couldn't be sated by that alone. She laid a second curse upon the knight: his body would never be able to refuse another lover. He would stay hard and aching, his body willing to please, until the end of time. To protect their local knight, the villagers built a tower in the middle of the woods and placed their own magic upon it. There he was sealed away, passing into local legend to most of the population. Only a select few know the truth and the name of the knight.

entry.title: Save Point
entry.summary:
Author: TheThirdChild

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 90,173Chapters: 25/26Kudos: 268

Summary: Stiles is determined to give Derek the perfect anniversary gift—the kind that proves he truly sees him. That somehow resulted in time travel and a surprise encounter with the Hale Pack pre-everything. Now he has to gather insight, avoid suspicion, and absolutely not rewrite history. Derek wanted something meaningful, but this might be too meaningful. Perfect gift status: pending.

entry.title: Doodles
entry.summary:
Author: Definitively_Different_Drivel

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,652Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 43

Summary: Screaming fabric stretched across Derek's skin. Damn though, those were pecs of truth, pinched and perky and perfectly poised beneath altogether too thin fabric. He'd need to take it up with Shakira, because yeah her hips didn't lie but clearly they weren't bastions of veracity like Derek's chest, and— shit. Derek's eyebrows grew stormier, like a pair of little thunderclouds, ready to rain on Stiles' tight-shirt parade, only without water, because life wasn't fair, demonstrated by the fact that his thoughts were now occupied by visions of Derek's t-shirt, soaked, wet, and wrapped like latex as the sight of tan skin seeped through and— Shit. What was he thinking about again? "You remember what happened last time you got me into a shirt this tight, don't you?"In which Stiles shrinks Derek's clothes and gets caught. Derek gets some very creative revenge. It ends, of course, in smut.

entry.title: Change On The Rise
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 133,981Chapters: 73/75Kudos: 85

Summary: (Teen Wolf/Stargate Crossover AU continuation)As summer draws to a close, the Littlefield pack continues their long road to recovery. Still reeling from his sister's death and resurrection, Derek returns to his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor; Cora grapples with the consequences of everything that transpired over the summer, including her return from the dead; and Stiles finds new ways to balance the desires of his inner demons with the needs of his pack.

entry.title: yearn for sleep that won't come
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,338Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 145

Summary: He’s been obsessed with Derek Hale ever since he moved to Beacon Hills. He used to imagine running into him at coffee shops and becoming friends and then boyfriends. No matter that Derek Hale’s reputation as "Derek Hale: sex god" had already started garnering traction by the time Stiles got to high school with him. And plus, you know, there’s the whole straight thing. But Stiles always held out some hope, because Derek wouldn’t have been the first “straight” jock on the lacrosse team to bend him over. He wouldn’t even have been the second. He would have been the third. So, there was always that little inkling of want in the back of Stiles’ mind, but it never came to fruition. Derek Hale went on to sleep with lots and lots and lots of girls and never once did he even spare a glance at Stiles or run into him at a coffee shop. And Stiles was sure, when he started at Beacon Hills University last year, that the chances were even slimmer, because this was college and there were twenty times as many students here as in high school. So, he quite confidently resigned himself to the fact that a relationship with Derek Hale would forever remain his deepest, darkest fantasy. But then six days ago, he showed up to Am Lit.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Weekend Prospects
entry.summary:
Author: brsfic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,240Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 140

Summary: Gay Twitter says the next town over has better bars, better vibes, and—most importantly—a much healthier Grindr population than Beacon Hills.Naturally, Stiles plans an entire weekend getaway around this information. New city, new grid, zero chance of running into someone he knows. The plan is simple: check out the nightlife, enjoy the atmosphere, maybe flirt a little, and see where the night takes him.What actually happens is that Stiles walks into the first bar on his list, makes eye contact with a very hot stranger in a leather jacket, and ends up cruising him within about five minutes.So much for pacing himself.
